chapter goal: How does a symmetric matrix turn points, lines, tangents, and duality into one computational system?
computational checks: cross-ratio invariance under a projective reparametrization
join/meet incidence for generated homogeneous points
mode-specific conic or hyperbolic numeric check when relevant
gaps: Proof-heavy material in Chapter 9 is represented by conic diagrams, determinant/cross-ratio checks, or small parameter experiments rather than copied text.

visual sequence.expected_observation: The conic matrix generates both a curve and its tangent/polar line data.
visual sequence.learner_inspection_target: For Chapter 9, inspect matrix conic contour by identifying which objects instantiate conic equations.
visual sequence.library: numpy, matplotlib, local projective/conic/Cayley-Klein helpers, and self-contained HTML
visual sequence.validation_target: sample point lies on its conic and tangent relation vanishes
